clean_body: Issue: 006 Monday, September 6, 2021 | First and foremost, Happy Labor Day! Today is a day we overwhelmingly take for granted, because it is | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Josh Weil for Senate - Newsletter | | | | Issue: 006 Monday, September 6, 2021 | | | First and foremost, Happy Labor Day! Today is a day we overwhelmingly take for granted, because it is meant to be a reprieve, a day of rest, and a three day weekend for those who work to live. But, it is also so much more than that, a memorial to the activists who fought and sometimes died to unionize and create a standard of rights for workers in the Western World that has become so normalized, we have trouble even imagining the way it used to be. Let's not forget that public schools are a byproduct of the victories of the labor movement, an inevitable concession, once child labor was relegated to the dustbins of history. Yesterday's labor champions had to withstand violent opposition to their strikes and protests, imprisonment and hunger strikes, and threats to their neighbors and families to gain collective bargaining rights, a 40 hour work week, safe workplaces, and THE WEEKEND! These changes were all necessary as the model for managing an agrarian world did not perfectly translate to the new industrial one they lived in. Similarly, today, we must continue to support our Union and Labor leaders as they fight tirelessly against those that want to superimpose the traditions and norms of an industrial world onto this new digital one. If you're not already a member of a Union, find one to support. Union leaders fight for all of us, whether you're a member or not, and we'd be dead without them. Happy Labor Day! | | | | IN REVIEW It's been a month since the Endless Summer finally ended, and I reported back to work for the 2021-22 school year. As a teacher and a political candidate, the intensity has been cranked up to 11, with the intersection of my personal Venn Diagram becoming a dangerous political hotbed. Our Governor tried making it illegal for local governments to go into lockdown or for schools to order mask mandates, and with Wave 4 of COVID and the Delta Variant decimating our state, he doubled down by authorizing the Commissioner of Education to begin withholding funds from school districts that defied him in order to protect their teachers and children. It has been a long month, with a lot of school board meetings, and a tremendous amount of politics forcing our district leaders into unenviable positions. Whatever county you are in, please, if you can, attend your local school board meetings and make your voice heard. I'll be at mine, again, tomorrow night. Inside the campaign, I want to announce the addition of Rocco Diaz to our team. He has joined the campaign in a part-time, hourly position as my new Call-Time Manager, and like all of our hourly workers, is paid $15/hr. I strongly believe in transparency when it comes to salaries and compensation, we will never hide what the employees at Weil for US Senate make, and we will never pay less than $15/hr. In order to pay people what they're worth, we have to have money, though. | | | | | WHAT'S NEXT I am back on the teacher schedule, so I can't travel as much as I did this summer, but we are still getting around. Already, this month, I've made canvassing trips to Bradford and Broward County, and we have additional trips coming up to Immokalee, Jacksonville, Fernandina Beach, Miami, and Tallahassee, all before Green Day wakes up. Thank you for your continued support, we've crossed the threshold, and now have less than a year remaining to the Primary Elections on August 23rd. It's a long road, getting from there to here, but we're going to walk every step of it and I can't wait to meet you all along the way! Together, we can win, and I can't wait to serve YOU as your next U.S. Senator! Stay Safe! -Josh | | | | | | | Follow Us | | | | | Share on social | | Created with | | | You've received this email because you are a subscriber of . If you feel you received it by mistake or wish to unsubscribe, please _.

name: Team AOC
subject: PRO Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
In honor of Labor Day, we’re breaking down the most urgent way we can support workers right now.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210906-2491-header&t=1&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)
This Labor Day, we’re breaking down the most urgent way we can support workers right now.
We have the opportunity to protect unions and expand labor rights by passing the _Protecting the Right to Organize Act_ – known as the PRO Act. The PRO Act passed in the House, but we need to put more pressure on to get it passed in the Senate.
**First, why unions?**
A union gives workers the ability to act together to advocate for safe working conditions, improve their wages and benefits, and protect their rights through collective bargaining and action.
Nationwide, union workers make 13.2% more in wages than nonunion workers and are more likely to have employer-provided pensions, health insurance, and other benefits.1
Studies show that unions reduce inequality and are essential for low- and middle-wage workers’ to get their fair share of economic growth.2 We know that declining unionization beginning in the 1970s has fueled rising inequality and stalled economic progress for the middle class.
In addition, giving workers a voice and leverage is essential for democracy. Unions increase participation in political causes and have been proven effective at getting people to the polls.3
**Why the decline in unionization?**
Current labor laws do far too little to protect workers who exercise their right to form or join a union.
Employers frequently threaten, harass, and intimidate workers who seek to form or join a union, even firing union activists. It’s a major reason why the share of workers in unions has decreased from 33.2% in 1956 to 10.7% in 2016.4
**What would the PRO Act do?**
The PRO Act would strengthen protections for workers who want to unionize by supporting workers who suffer retaliation from their employers and enhance the rights of workers to boycott, strike, and take other collective action.
It would prevent employers from using loopholes to deny pay, benefits, and rights to employees and forbid employer interference in union elections.
This law would make it illegal for employers to use company-sponsored meetings with mandatory attendance to lobby against a union-organizing drive and establish monetary penalties for companies that violate workers’ rights.
Lastly, it would prevent an employer from using an employee’s immigration status against them when determining the terms of their employment.
**What’s next?**
In May, we joined the Democratic Socialists of America to reach voters in states where crucial Senators have yet to sign onto the PRO Act.
Together we made 934,000 dials across Arizona, Maine, West Virginia, Virginia, and Alaska talking to voters about why we need to pass the PRO Act and rebuild our labor movement.
By building that pressure coming from people across the country, we flipped Senator Angus King of Maine and Senator Joe Manchin of West Virginia to support the PRO Act. But we still need more Senators to step up.
Together, we can build the largest unionized workforce in history that will fight and win for working families across the country. **Please stay tuned for more updates and ways you can help pass the PRO Act.**
In solidarity,
Team AOC
1 - [Economic Policy Institute
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10039?t=2&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)2 - [Economic Policy Institute
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10039?t=3&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)3 - "[What Unions No Longer Do" - Jake Rosenfeld
](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10040?t=4&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)4 - [Economic Policy Institute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10039?t=5&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210906-2491-P_OTH_EXP_LAB&t=6&refcode2=2491_2526796_ztzWSl&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210906-2491-P_OTH_EXP_LAB&t=7&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=2491%2E2526796%2EztzWSl)

name: Greg Lopez for Governor
subject: Happy Labor Day!
body:
We honor our laborers and the fruits they bring to our communities.
| | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Greg Honors Laborers &
# Small Businesses
---
| |
---
| Although not a Federal holiday until President Grover Cleveland signed official legislation on June 28, 1894, Colorado was the second state to recognize the holiday honoring those who labor on March 15, 1887.
Thanks to Colorado's ever forward-thinking culture our Sixth General Assembly passed a bill to recognize the first Monday in September as a day to honor our laborers and their plentiful fruits.
This Labor Day let us not forget the multitudes of professionals with collars of many colors, that make our great society what it has become and what it is yet to be.
Colorado is a people made of many backgrounds, cultures, and talents. We have so much to offer one another, may we take the time today to recognize the gifts we have in each other and the importance of preserving our unique way of life for our next generation and those who come to Colorado seeking our way of life.
Greg Lopez shares the vision of saving Colorado from California and others who seek to change Colorado fundamentally. It is up to you to see that this stops now.
Labor for a cause.
Labor for a change.
Labor for Colorado.
---

Friends,

I hope everyone is having a wonderful Labor Day. Today is a day to celebrate the impact that labor unions have brought.

Across Arizona, labor unions are the backbone of our economy. Labor Day is a great way to celebrate their hard work. In Congress, I’m working hard to protect workers, and I’m proud of what unions have been able to accomplish.

As you celebrate Labor Day today, remember that unions made it possible. Have a happy Labor Day, everybody.

\--Tom O'Halleran

---
****_Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. name: Tim Ryan
subject: It’s not just a day off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=762%2E3611125%2EKh39TN ][IMG]

Team,

This Labor Day, I’m thinking of all the reasons why I decided to run for
Senate.

Today is about workers.

Workers have been on the frontlines of every movement for progress in our
country’s history. The labor movement won massive victories that continue
to shape our lives to this day -- 40 hour work weeks, reliable benefits,
collective bargaining, and more. They got kids out of dangerous factories
and have always fought to ensure that for all of us, a hard day’s work
earns every cent it deserves.

But we're far from finished.

Since 1978, worker compensation has risen by about 12%, while CEO
compensation has skyrocketed 940% -- pushing income inequality to an
all-time high.

Across our country, massive corporations have colluded with right-wing
lawmakers to pass restrictive labor laws.

And today, millions of Ohioans and Americans are doing everything right,
only to feel themselves falling further behind thanks to stagnant wages,
outrageous health care costs, and a lack of investment in our blue-collar
communities.

I’m running for Senate to cut workers in on the deal -- to make sure that
those who keep our country running finally get the support they deserve.

I’ve been in union halls and picket lines my whole life. I promise you
that as Ohio’s next Senator, I will fight like hell for every working
family in this country. Together, we’ll carry on what the labor movement
started -- today, tomorrow, and every day after.

In solidarity,

Tim Ryan

Together, we’ll carry on what the labor movement started -- today, tomorrow, and every day after. In solidarity, Tim Ryan [ ]Donate [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [ ]click here. If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below! name: Josh Harder
subject: Union work is in my blood
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/0wq8TvsXsxmeKqnIhrdaGOxo1X0cpNjQVJu37k1Xupg=/1rSeP6-6VqbOBwA9SFdLh-Iz8F_pH4M-v311DVXMWyQ=?refcode=E11141-20210906-LaborDay-header-Holiday-RegTemplate-WorkerRightsMinWage-NA&amount=15) | Peter, This Labor Day, we pause to remember the struggle and celebrate the achievements of the labor rights movement. This movement is personal to me because my dad was a member of Retail Clerks #1179 for over 15 years. I grew up on union benefits as a kid, so when I was elected as one of the youngest members of Congress in history, I knew I owed it to the generations of workers before me, hardworking folks like my dad, to continue fighting to advance their labor rights. Especially over the last year when frontline workers kept us afloat during the pandemic, I am proud we passed legislation to expand paid sick leave and fight wage discrimination. Union work is in my blood, and I'll never stop advocating for all the workers in our community. Today we honor the hard work and sacrifice of the labor movement and recommit to pushing for a more just and fair economy for our families. Happy Labor Day, Josh [DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/0wq8TvsXsxmeKqnIhrdaGOxo1X0cpNjQVJu37k1Xupg=/1rSeP6-6VqbOBwA9SFdLh-Iz8F_pH4M-v311DVXMWyQ=?refcode=E11141-20210906-LaborDay-SB-Holiday-RegTemplate-WorkerRightsMinWage-NA&amount=15)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Solidarity forever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, Happy Labor Day! Today and every day, I'm proud to honor, celebrate, and fight for working people across America.
Without organized labor, we wouldn't have the weekend, overtime pay, workplace safety rules, and child labor laws — _and that’s just scratching the surface._
**But as someone who organized on the ground for working people and true economic justice long before coming to Congress, I know that America still has a long way to go to guarantee that every worker has a living wage and a fair and safe workplace where they are treated with dignity.**
Here are two issues heavy on my mind today:
1. **If there were ever a time to #RaiseTheWage after 12 long years, it’s NOW.** It has taken a tremendous amount of organizing to get to where we are today on raising the minimum wage — I will be the first one to tell you that.

_But victory is possible._ I’ve organized for years in the Fight for $15. In 2014, I pushed to make Seattle the first major city in the country to pass a $15 minimum wage. Since then, cities and states across this country have followed our lead. Twenty states just raised their minimum wage going into 2021 — including Florida, while voting for Donald Trump.

We have an opportunity to get this done across America by passing the Raise the Wage Act, which would increase pay for 32 million workers while lifting one million out of poverty. At a time when full-time, minimum-wage workers can no longer afford a two-bedroom rental anywhere in the entire country, _our action is necessary — and I’m dedicated to making it happen._

2. **The PRO Act is our best shot in a generation at transforming the workplace and putting workers back on a path toward dignity and shared prosperity.** The Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act is a transformative bill that, if passed, will empower workers to form unions and bargain for better wages and working conditions, hold corporations accountable for union-busting, and repeal so-called “right to work” laws.

I was proud to lead the House in passing the PRO Act. Now it’s the Senate’s turn, and I won’t stop fighting until this bill reaches President Biden’s desk.

So, Peter, it’s clear: We owe so much to the activists and organizers who earned the rights we have today and who continue to fight for working people everywhere. **[If you’re with me in the fight for a $15 minimum wage and the PRO Act, chip in $3 or any amount today to power our movement forward for working people.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5574?refcode=em20210906-607&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=607%2E420207%2EsFgeen)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/5574?refcode=em20210906-607&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=607%2E420207%2EsFgeen)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210906-607-footer&t=22&refcode2=607_420207_sFgeen&akid=607%2E420207%2EsFgeen)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=607%2E420207%2EsFgeen)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=607%2E420207%2EsFgeen)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: The labor movement makes Nevada proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor
body:
| | |
---
[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zhkRCb1IEUbKN0NGVinwHycy0zhZnNHb8-fCzX4KtoZFGA_VpLRnIRhMPfGNA71gJxNjGsrkCGxyOUTEN2Td5Lnm68gOazhpXZoD3VqG2_-H6FQdizcs_OKyqh-hmsnEx9x1IH50nd52A6GCaLw6kEHzUHY2ZbYsgjD7Z4Gbwa4WRx8w37GuJYec1dGos4o8CbPKf8EdXWvAag5-7IR0f2P_2CQidXnMoX7UtYw0p2SWdnLYFp8z1NU1I1RpJCl06vK8-cgpPPCbnczgojDKtwEt-3DXoFc4qxPO78k2wuJpGKQaTW6AGeNI1Ucr3U9OaVPCDMJQx0TQEcf4YWXU6G1-_fJAsxJyCaOKWA3Bgl1Q/3f3/s_o7_jv3RqCkUFxTf83eVQ/h0/j1d46FaLp6Y8yorP0g7BQIhVN0n7-s0QajoG0BKxLP0)
| | Folks, I’ve always believed that labor unions are the backbone of Nevada. Because of their resilience, the labor movement secured us many of the rights that we too often take for granted today. Work breaks, paid sick leave, weekends off, workers’ compensation, minimum wage, health care coverage, vacation time, and so much more are now commonplace in the workplace. **It’s because of the sacrifices of labor union activists that Nevadans can enjoy many of the benefits that they look for in a workplace environment.** We cannot mistake the heroic progress of the men and women in the labor movement as a sign that the fight is over. It’s imperative that we continue the fight to secure every workplace protection and right for working people. Leading by example, Nevada’s prominent hospitality unions have famously led the way on workplace reform and protections. A few weeks back, I signed **Assembly Bill 190** into law which supports Nevada caregivers by giving them flexibility with paid sick leave to take care of family members with medical needs. This new legislation, which is a major step forward for some of Nevada’s heroic workers, wouldn’t have been passed if labor unions hadn’t paved the way beforehand. There’s a lot of work left to be done to fully guarantee the rights of every worker in Nevada and across the country. But, today, **I remain in awe of the progress made by labor unions which has transformed the American workforce and protected working people.** As Governor, I’ll continue to uplift and stand alongside labor priorities in Nevada because every person deserves a fair wage, benefits, and protections in the workplace. I hope you’ll join me in this commitment. In solidarity, Steve Sisolak
---

name: Susie Lee
subject: Here’s why Labor Day is underrated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35324213/304714302/-1528880522?refcode=SL_headerlogoAB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWVkNTA2NS01NTBmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vYOhObusETQe4Odiu8EZ56jwTuGVPNRtSRZcxbhc9qE=)

| | Folks, **Nevada workers are empowered because of our labor unions.** Today, I’m thinking about the trailblazers who gave us the five day work week, worker safety standards, Social Security, paid time off, worker’s compensation, and so much more. In recent months, we’ve seen that our workforce is on the rebound after taking a severe blow due to the pandemic. While this continues to impact so many families across Nevada and the country as a whole, I’m confident that our economy will rebound and be stronger than before. We can thank this rebound to generations of tireless work on part of the labor movement. They’ve fought for basic rights for workers and instilled confidence in the American workforce. Labor unions have proven that when workers are cared for, our economy is stronger. In Congress, I’ll continue to fight alongside labor unions for good-paying jobs, protected pensions, apprenticeship and vocational training, raising the minimum wage, and whatever else I can do to keep our workforce’s gears well oiled. Enjoy your holiday, get some well-deserved rest, and keep your thanks in mind for our resilient labor movement. In solidarity, Susie Lee
---

clean_body: | = | | Folks, Nevada workers are empowered because of our labor unions. Today, I’m thinking about the trailblazers who gave us the five day work week, worker safety standards, Social Security, paid time off, worker’s compensation, and so much more. In recent months, we’ve seen that our workforce is on the rebound after taking a severe blow due to the pandemic. While this continues to impact so many families across Nevada and the country as a whole, I’m confident that our economy will rebound and be stronger than before. We can thank this rebound to generations of tireless work on part of the labor movement. They’ve fought for basic rights for workers and instilled confidence in the American workforce. Labor unions have proven that when workers are cared for, our economy is stronger. In Congress, I’ll continue to fight alongside labor unions for good-paying jobs, protected pensions, apprenticeship and vocational training, raising the minimum wage, and whatever else I can do to keep our workforce’s gears well oiled. Enjoy your holiday, get some well-deserved rest, and keep your thanks in mind for our resilient labor movement. In solidarity, Susie Lee | | = If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, you can = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0rh71ai5liptg420993lmvoqleu8thr8ms8o48o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0cjhm4o34c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z40upfo1g28thtkrmaccitaj5kulv4asg6qtv2o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0cjhm4o34c5h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z122urhb5bq5vmcme2kdp89af3cd734dfnfqo118_rp22sh2s8i66pj0cjhm4o34c5h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv08neqep3nehjh15kv4oobchbk5ac9roqfct31g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0cjhm4o34c5h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |

Dear Peter,
I am excited to share I will be officially sworn in as District 18's next Assemblymember tomorrow!
Day: Tuesday, September 7th
Time: 11AM
Check your inbox tomorrow morning for the link to access the ceremony on the web or your TV.
I can't wait to get to work!

Mia Bonta

Derek — we have three very important pieces of information to share with you.
1. CNN has again named us one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.

2. Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”

3. So now we need your help! Our goal in August is to get 50,000 donations to help fuel this campaign to keep Mark in the Senate.

And it’s going to be crucial we hit this goal, because with the Senate again up for grabs, this is already a multimillion-dollar race.

**We still have time left this month to dig deep and knock this goal out of the park. So with our deadline approaching, we have to ask:

[If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Common Good VA? name: Great America Update
subject: Studying his accomplishments is needed
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c329%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=fJxtNzYms9wzbvoARAONLw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65347%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IdF77bkGLw3d4x%2f763jhvw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65348%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CM6Os%2fokdAJ%2fhnHcRgmc8A&sysid=1)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65347%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IdF77bkGLw3d4x%2f763jhvw&sysid=1) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift--before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65349%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O14tSbF5bxFQ3G0UjXnq%2fw&sysid=1)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: L’Shanah Tovah!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
This week, my family and millions around the world will celebrate Rosh Hashanah, the Jewish New Year.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/35327357/304723272/343728020?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210906-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGFlZDgzYi02ODBmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzU3YmEzZWQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S-qAIupguJIkSnh2LMXhD9uqJNPV7TFut9hcrDWZRFg=)
---
| This week, my family and millions around the world will celebrate Rosh Hashanah, the Jewish New Year. I am so grateful to be able to take time to celebrate with my family and loved ones, and that with some precautions, we are able to be together in person this year.

As we enter a new year in the Jewish calendar, I am reflecting on the year we just had — the heartbreaks and the hope, the darkness and the light. As we look ahead, I’m more committed than ever to making sure that this upcoming year is better than the last, and that we are supporting the most vulnerable in our communities and working in pursuit of a better world.

I wish you and your loved ones a joyful, sweet, and healthy new year. L’Shanah Tovah to all who celebrate!

All my best,
Sara
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: It's time to make some NOISE!
body:
I want to tell you the story of Samuel Heider, a Jew from Poland.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/KJK4cLP1H6LHMnUAoUuKnQ/vxT9rez8AkxM56x1kqgYeA)
Patriot,

Happy Labor Day!

I hope you're relaxing with friends and family, and if so, I wanted to share a quick story that I hope you pass along to them.

Today is also Rosh HaShanah - a BIG Jewish holiday that is the start of our New Year.

It's one of our High Holy Days where we read prayers and sing songs that have been with our culture for countless generations - even when a generation had been nearly wiped out, the traditions lived on.

I want to tell you the story of Samuel Heider, a Jew from Poland.

In 1942, the ghetto where Samuel's family was living was cleared. His family was sent to the gas chambers of Treblinka and he was sent to Auschwitz.

When Samuel arrived at Auschwitz, he went through a selection process which consisted of Josef Mengele pointing at a human being and waiving his hand left or right.

A motion of Mengele's hand to the right, meant work detail.

A wave to the left meant immediate death or worse.

Samuel received a wave to the right, and was sent to several more concentration camps before being liberated at Dachau on April 30, 1945.

When he was finally free from the cruelty of the Nazi's, Samuel Heider was an adult who weighed just 75 pounds.

His family was dead, and he struggled with the depth of loss he had faced. The only thing that kept him from thoughts of suicide was knowing he was the last living member of his blood line.

As the High Holy Days approached, Samuel was living in a recovery camp with 200 other survivors. He was determined to carry out his family traditions with a celebration, and he asked around for a Rabbi to help.

While he didn't find a rabbi, Samuel was directed to an Army chaplain.

The chaplain cobbled together payer books, a shofar, and after a good deal of searching, he found a Torah for Samuel.

Samuel made use of the chaplain's efforts, and on the first day of Rosh HaShanah, a few of the men from the camp showed up to join the ceremony.

Samuel sang from memory and carried out a service that filled the hearts of the Holocaust survivors.

On the second day of Rosh HaShanah, Samuel held another service and there wasn't a spare seat to be had!

Our traditions didn't just survive for another generation, they were given strength in their survival!

As a Jewish woman, I'm touched by Samuel's story.

As an American, I'm given hope.

I'm given hope that our love of liberty can survive the worst.

I'll be blunt.

We're headed into some dark days as Democrats rush to implement their policies and use every excuse in the book to justify their actions.

Just like Samuel held dear his Jewish traditions, we have to hold dear our love of liberty.

Liberty is a simple thing . . . as long as we don't harm others, we should have the freedom to do what's best for ourselves, our families and our communities without government interference.

Today, the opposite is happening.
* Our children are being muzzled like dogs in school and are being taught to fear each other.
* Americans are being pressured to inject vaccines into themselves and their children despite science and common sense contradicting the government solutions.
* Our workers are being paid off to stay at home.
* Our entire society is being turned into a welfare nation that relies on the government for food and shelter.
* And now we have to live with the threat of Islamic Terrorism again thanks to Biden's Policy of Weakness.

And what's the result from all of this?

Every time an American is "saved" by the government - from illness, hunger, homelessness, or even saved from the fear of terrorism, what do you think happens?

Government gets even more powerful.

So do me a favor, on Rosh HaShanah, we celebrate by "raising a noise."

Regardless of whether or not you're Jewish, you can raise your own noise today by sharing this story and making people open their minds and think about what's happening in America today.

Thanks so much for all that you do.

Happy Labor Day and Rosh HaShanah,

Laura Loomer

clean_body: I want to tell you the story of Samuel Heider, a Jew from Poland. | | | Patriot, Happy Labor Day! I hope you're relaxing with friends and family, and if so, I wanted to share a quick story that I hope you pass along to them. Today is also Rosh HaShanah - a BIG Jewish holiday that is the start of our New Year. It's one of our High Holy Days where we read prayers and sing songs that have been with our culture for countless generations - even when a generation had been nearly wiped out, the traditions lived on. I want to tell you the story of Samuel Heider, a Jew from Poland. In 1942, the ghetto where Samuel's family was living was cleared. His family was sent to the gas chambers of Treblinka and he was sent to Auschwitz. When Samuel arrived at Auschwitz, he went through a selection process which consisted of Josef Mengele pointing at a human being and waiving his hand left or right. A motion of Mengele's hand to the right, meant work detail. A wave to the left meant immediate death or worse. Samuel received a wave to the right, and was sent to several more concentration camps before being liberated at Dachau on April 30, 1945. When he was finally free from the cruelty of the Nazi's, Samuel Heider was an adult who weighed just 75 pounds. His family was dead, and he struggled with the depth of loss he had faced. The only thing that kept him from thoughts of suicide was knowing he was the last living member of his blood line. As the High Holy Days approached, Samuel was living in a recovery camp with 200 other survivors. He was determined to carry out his family traditions with a celebration, and he asked around for a Rabbi to help. While he didn't find a rabbi, Samuel was directed to an Army chaplain. The chaplain cobbled together payer books, a shofar, and after a good deal of searching, he found a Torah for Samuel. Samuel made use of the chaplain's efforts, and on the first day of Rosh HaShanah, a few of the men from the camp showed up to join the ceremony. Samuel sang from memory and carried out a service that filled the hearts of the Holocaust survivors. On the second day of Rosh HaShanah, Samuel held another service and there wasn't a spare seat to be had! Our traditions didn't just survive for another generation, they were given strength in their survival! As a Jewish woman, I'm touched by Samuel's story. As an American, I'm given hope. I'm given hope that our love of liberty can survive the worst. I'll be blunt. We're headed into some dark days as Democrats rush to implement their policies and use every excuse in the book to justify their actions. Just like Samuel held dear his Jewish traditions, we have to hold dear our love of liberty. Liberty is a simple thing . . . as long as we don't harm others, we should have the freedom to do what's best for ourselves, our families and our communities without government interference. Today, the opposite is happening. Our children are being muzzled like dogs in school and are being taught to fear each other. Americans are being pressured to inject vaccines into themselves and their children despite science and common sense contradicting the government solutions. Our workers are being paid off to stay at home. Our entire society is being turned into a welfare nation that relies on the government for food and shelter. * And now we have to live with the threat of Islamic Terrorism again thanks to Biden's Policy of Weakness. And what's the result from all of this? Every time an American is "saved" by the government - from illness, hunger, homelessness, or even saved from the fear of terrorism, what do you think happens? Government gets even more powerful. So do me a favor, on Rosh HaShanah, we celebrate by "raising a noise." Regardless of whether or not you're Jewish, you can raise your own noise today by sharing this story and making people open their minds and think about what's happening in America today. Thanks so much for all that you do. Happy Labor Day and Rosh HaShanah, Laura Loomer Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. body:
Biden's Afghanistan disaster keeps getting worse. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/unvetted-2472858?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=50139ca525&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

American troops are now dying so Biden and his globalist friends can flood the United States with untold numbers of unvetted refugees.

How many refugees are headed to America? _Nobody knows_.

Are these people our allies, or do they hate everything America stands for? _We don't know that either_.

And worse, I'm one of the only people here in Washington asking these questions.

The Communist Democrats and the RINOs are perfectly happy letting more Americans die in a Taliban-controlled war zone, so we can bring unknown entities to the United States by the tens of thousands.

It's long past time to evacuate ALL American citizens, and get our troops out of Afghanistan for good.

I'm battling for an America First foreign policy that brings our troops home without delay, and ensures that we NEVER have a quagmire like Afghanistan again.

[**Show me you have my back with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=646934ed09&e=645b3b1338).

[**Anything you can chip in will help me end the Biden Administration's reckless, grossly incompetent Afghanistan disaster**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=95ff112eee&e=645b3b1338).

I thought that after nearly 20 years of war in the Middle East -- which cost us precious American lives and billions of dollars -- we would be able to execute the simple mission of packing up, getting our citizens out, and heading home.

But I guess I was giving the Biden Administration too much credit.

He is either grossly unfit for office -- or worse -- he planned to use American troops as human shields for evacuating Afghan refugees and flooding America.

_Either way, Americans were put last as usual, and this time, the consequences were deadly_.

[**With your generous contributions to my reelection campaign today, I can keep working to put America First in Congress**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ca06f9f3cc&e=645b3b1338).

[**_A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 or MORE to my reelection campaign right away helps me fight to end this insane foreign policy, and focus on the immediate problems facing our country_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=9d7d7411f9&e=645b3b1338).

But I need your help right away.

We need a massive America First comeback in 2022, and that process starts right now.

We can't let the globalists retain all of the power in Washington, or they will keep invading and destroying foreign lands, and creating more refugees to flood America.

[**Stop them with a generous contribution to my campaign today, and show them you are onto their plan**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=ac3af87aa6&e=645b3b1338).
---
| Thank you in advance for helping me put America First, and end the crisis of unvetted refugees flooding America.

For Freedom,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=49a73a1de7&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The Biden administration is sacrificing American troops to make sure Afghan refugees escape the country safely.

_There has never been a more grotesque example of putting Americans last_.

[**Help me fight the Biden Administration's gross negligence with a generous contribution to my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=c7be4ec963&e=645b3b1338).

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Labor Day
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
This Labor Day, will you stand with workers and add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the PRO Act?
#

Happy Labor Day!
Today is a day to pay tribute to the incredible contributions of workers — and the entire labor movement — to our nation.
America’s unions are central to the prosperity and well-being of American workers. But the truth is that the right to organize is under attack here in America.
For decades, there’s been an effort to undermine America’s unions and make it more difficult to organize. As a result, wages have stagnated and benefits have been cut while CEOs and executives are doing better than ever.
So even as we recognize the importance of labor, we must continue to fight for equal access to employment, fair wages, and the right to organize.
**That’s why I’m proud to co-sponsor the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act in the Senate, and it’s why I’m asking you to add your name to mine today as a citizen co-sponsor:**
[**This Labor Day, will you stand with workers and add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the PRO Act?**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/pro_act/?source=em210906-1-15&t=1&akid=283%2E159979%2E4JKJJ0)
**[CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/pro_act/?source=em210906-1-15&t=2&akid=283%2E159979%2E4JKJJ0)**
Like the name suggests, the PRO Act will empower workers to organize and collectively bargain together for changes in their workplace without fear of intimidation or retaliation.
It’s a law that is long overdue, and one that will go a long way toward making our economy work for ALL of us — not just the ultra-rich.
Workers deserve to have a level playing field and fair representation in negotiating better benefits and wages. That is why we must pass the PRO Act and push back against the ongoing assault on unions.
[**Please add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the PRO Act, and together we will fight to put power where it belongs — in the hands of the workers.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/pro_act/?source=em210906-1-15&t=3&akid=283%2E159979%2E4JKJJ0)
Thank you for adding your name to mine and standing with workers in California and across the country who would benefit from the PRO Act.
In solidarity,
\- Alex
**[CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/pro_act/?source=em210906-1-15&t=4&akid=283%2E159979%2E4JKJJ0)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=283%2E159979%2E4JKJJ0)

Virginia was a key battleground in 2020 and Virginia Democrats responded by turning out in record numbers. In the end, we stood together and Donald Trump was a one-term President.

Today’s outlook isn’t so rosy. Recent polling shows me and Youngkin in a virtual tie. And my opponent is vowing to spend $75 million from his vast personal fortune in the final months of this campaign.

name: Gwen Moore
subject: Labor Day is personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress |
body:
My Sisters and Brothers, as the daughter of proud union parents Labor Day is very personal to me.

Today, I hope you had a good day enjoying Labor Day with family and friends, and also taking time to appreciate the success of our nation because of union workers and our labor community. We must Build Back Better and rededicate ourselves to both strengthening and empowering union workers and the labor movement across America.

When we work together to create opportunities for the American workforce, we are working to make all our lives better.

To all our union workers, THANK YOU!

#UnionStrong & #WeRepresent

-Gwen Moore
Proudly representing Wisconsin's Fourth Congressional District
Proud Co-Lead of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
Stay Connected! Text "GWEN" to 313131 for campaign updates!

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

Donate using this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gwenseptember21?refcode=090621

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Gosar endorses Finchem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Election integrity train rolls forward |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8063515b81&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

The Election Integrity Movement is gaining huge momentum as America First patriots gather for the cause. Starting last Fall, President Trump said:

**_”Mark Finchem is a real leader in Arizona.”_**

And this weekend, we gained a critical endorsement in my campaign for Secretary of State. But more on that in a moment.

My name is Mark Finchem, and I am the America First Patriot who first paid for the Election integrity hearings in Arizona out-of-pocket. I listened when everyone else covered their ears.

**_I spoke when the rest were silent._**

And now we are leading what is the greatest grassroots movement of a generation, a movement to restore integrity to American elections, and to restore the soul of America.

**_[Are you with me? Can you help our cause with a donation today of $25, $50, $100, or more?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=39bd943fdd&e=44b8c466b0)_**

That brings me to today. After a valiant effort where we have fought numerous legal attacks on America’s audit in Maricopa County, where we have established indisputable evidence of fraud in Arizona elections, and where we have ignited an election integrity movement that has spread all the way from California to Georgia, we are seeing even more proud patriots join our cause.

**_This is why I am proud to announce the endorsement of Representative Paul Gosar._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f40b5f4deb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **_My campaign has secured the endorsement of Representative Paul Gosar, a staunch defender of Conservative values. He knows that I am a fighter. He knows that I won’t back down to the thieving, radical Left._**
---
|
---
|
---
| Representative Paul Gosar supports me “without hesitation” to be our next Secretary of State in Arizona. This is huge.

**Words cannot describe how big this is for our campaign to be next Secretary of State in Arizona.**

[And this is where you come in.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1c99e37d3e&e=44b8c466b0)

_No matter how many endorsements we get from proud America first Patriots who are joining our case, at the end of the day it is your support that matters._

**We are up against a wall. Every day it becomes harder to get the word out about election integrity as the main stream media REFUSES to cover the good work that we are doing in Maricopa County.**

_We are preparing for more legal attacks from the Department of Justice’s Merrick Garland and others, who have been targeting us because they are scared of the work that we have done._

**Right now, we have the Democrats in a corner, and they are scared, and they will fight back.**

_[And this is why I need your support today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e051167db2&e=44b8c466b0). We need to build a war chest to fight back against the ongoing and inevitable attacks by the mainstream media, the Department of Justice, and phony Radical Leftist Legal groups._

_[Please support my campaign for Secretary of State in Arizona today. We are bolstering our defenses and building our war chest, and our campaign desperately needs your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b73b457b96&e=44b8c466b0)_

_[*Make a Statement with Dr. Paul Gosar*](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=79147bcfac&e=44b8c466b0)_

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America-First Arizonan, former paramedic, policeman, and first responder, and proud member of the business community.

**I have directed my life-long passion to helping others to helping Americans protect the soul of their Constitution – Election Integrity.**

This is personal to me. We all know that President Trump should STILL be President.

_Instead, we have a demented President incapable of leading the Union, and now American blood is on Afghanistan soil._

**All America First Patriots need to join together. [_Join me, President Trump, Bernard Kerik, and Dr. Paul Gosar with a donation today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5b6842afa0&e=44b8c466b0)**
[_Please donate TODAY to make a stand against the Democrats, and stand up for our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9675ca9ad6&e=44b8c466b0)

[Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6365b5a506&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cdee3847b5&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=cec245e785) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=cec245e785).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Unforgiveable and unacceptable!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Leave no American behind |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a4ef8e3d75&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

In my decades in the U.S. Army, there was one rule we never forgot:

_Leave no soldier behind._

Joe Biden forgot that rule. And now he must pay- by being impeached and removed.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e3190ab767&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who will follow Biden to the unemployment lines!**

Do you remember? Not that long ago?

Do you remember Biden's empty promises of not leaving Americans behind? It's a promise I know well, having lived it for decades of my life.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3ea0afbdb5&e=afa21b7626)
---
| _President Biden appears to have broken his promise to stay in Afghanistan until every American is evacuated.

Marine Corps Gen. Kenneth F. McKenzie Jr. announced Monday evening that the last of the U.S. troops stationed at the Kabul airport had left, completing the military’s drawdown in the country, even though hundreds of Americans likely remain.

McKenzie, commander of U.S. Central Command, said some American citizens who wanted to leave Afghanistan remained in the country. _

So what happened here? Hundreds or thousands of Americans- many trying, in vain, to get to the airport and to freedom- were abandoned to torture, violence, and hostage taking by a thuggish terrorist regime.

We abandoned them. Or more accurately, JOE BIDEN ABANDONED THEM.

Many will not make it out alive. Many will be caught and tortured and ransomed.

And it will all be Biden's fault, and his alone.

**_Biden left Americans behind on the battlefield. Now it's time to leave Biden behind._**
---
|
---
| **Biden is out of his league, and most likely mentally compromised. He callously left and allowed hundreds, and likely thousands, of Americans to die. **

We must impeach Biden. The country demands it. Yet for some reason, party leaders- Swampers on BOTH sides of the aisle- are pushing back on impeaching him!

_Speaking at an event in Kentucky on Wednesday, Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell shut down the notion that President Joe Biden would be impeached anytime soon.

"Well, look, the president's not going to be removed from office," McConnell replied when asked whether Biden's behavior was impeachable._

Biden's incompetence will go down in history. What he did cost many American lives, and for NO GOOD REASON!

_I'm not a Swamper. I'm a soldier. I will hold Biden and his sycophants accountable. I will vote to impeach and investigate his corrupt regime. My Democrat opponent, Democrat Darren Soto, will not._

What Biden has done is impeachable. We must take back Congress in 2022 and oust this demented fool!

We need to change Congress to hold Biden accountable! [Help me get elected and impeach Biden!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=231fddccc3&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6b85a16955&e=afa21b7626)? I got more votes here than any Republican ever in 2020. It's a red-trending area in a red-trending state! We can win it in 2022.

No more "nice guy" politics. Help me get to Congress and impeach him!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5d6f7688a0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=ca321e3727&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6d0e9a4828&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=7f1c282aa1&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
_William Olson is a retired member of the US Army Active Guard Reserve. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense._
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 William Olson for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
William Olson for Congress242 Kendal WayDavenport, FL 33837-4542
[Add us to your address book](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=1ac4858bb6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=1ac4858bb6).

CNN UPGRADED Democrats' chances of defeating Rubio and flipping this seat blue. But political experts are saying resources will make the difference between winning and losing, so I CANNOT afford to fall short today.
